toggleToLogin: Already have an account? Log in

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPasswordScreen.title: Forgot password
forgotPasswordScreen.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgotPasswordScreen.success: If this email exists, a reset link has been sent.

resetPasswordScreen.title: Reset password
resetPasswordScreen.subtitle: Paste the token received by email or open the link directly from your device.
resetPasswordScreen.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

passwordChange.cardBody: Enter your current password then choose a new secure password.
passwordChange.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
passwordChange.newPasswordSameAsOld: New password must be different from the old one
passwordChange.forgotBody: If you no longer remember your current password, use the email reset option.

privacy.dataManagementBody: You can request an export of your personal data before deleting your account.
privacy.warningBody: Deleting your account is irreversible from the user side. The backend currently performs a soft delete.
privacy.deleteConfirmBody: This action erases your data via a soft-delete on the backend. Do you want to continue?

logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?
logout.failed: Failed to log out. Please try again.

onboarding.saveFailed: Unable to save the guide state. Please try again.
onboarding.fromHelpNotice: This guide is opened from the help screen. Your onboarding progress is still saved.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your expenses, events and quick actions.

subscription.title: Add a subscription
subscription.description: Create your subscriptions, reminders and billing periods easily.

cloud.title: Cloud / Documents
cloud.description: Import and organize your documents in folders.

promotions.title: Promotions

bullets: Offers visible in the Promos tab

profile-security.title: Profile & Security
